ham:
Dear Employee,

Your salary of INR 75,000 has been credited to your bank account ending in 1234 on 07 Apr 2026. Please log in to your employee portal to review the details. If you notice any discrepancy, contact HR immediately.

Thank you,
Payroll Team
spam: Hey, you missed your package! The courier says it was delivered but we don't have any record. Act fast! Click here <URL> to confirm delivery and avoid a charge. If you ignore this, you might have to pay a $50 fee. Reply NOW!
